clusters.headline: Trump warns ‘all hell will rain down’ if Iran tries to get a nuclear weapon
clusters.summary: US president also made unusually critical comments about Israel's military offensive in Lebanon.

clusters.headline: Who is the Somali referee barred from entering the US for the World Cup?
clusters.summary: Omar Artan was set to become the first Somali to referee a game at the World Cup finals, but his place in history has been denied by US immigration authorities.

clusters.headline: Nigerian army frees widow of ex-general who died in captivity
clusters.summary: Maj Gen Rabe Abubakar and his wife Amina were abducted in north-west Nigeria at the end of last month.

clusters.headline: South African jazz legend Abdullah Ibrahim dies at 91
clusters.summary: Ibrahim helped define a genre of South African jazz music in a career that spanned eight decades.

clusters.headline: Tunisia sack head coach just one game into World Cup
clusters.summary: Tunisia sack Sabri Lamouchi one game into their World Cup, with former Morocco and Saudi Arabia manager Herve Renard replacing him.

clusters.headline: South Africa: Ramaphosa Says He'll 'Suffer Irreparable Harm' If Impeachment Process Continues Before Court Review
clusters.summary: [Daily Maverick] As the EFF and ATM prepare to oppose President Cyril Ramaphosa's urgent bid to halt Parliament's Phala Phala impeachment inquiry, the President insists he had 'no option' but to approach the courts, arguing that the Constitutional Court ruling has revived a report that could ultimat

clusters.headline: ‘Critical’ with RTS Link launch: Johor’s caretaker chief minister calls on Putrajaya to expedite ART rail plan
clusters.summary: Onn Hafiz Ghazi made the call on Johor's elevated Autonomous Rapid Transit (ART) project at an event on Tuesday (Jun 16) attended by Transport Minister Anthony Loke.

clusters.headline: Africa: From World Cup Inspiration to World Cup Hero - the Extraordinary Story Behind Cape Verde's Vozinha
clusters.summary: [CAF] Cape Verde's historic FIFA World Cup debut against Spain produced many memorable moments, but perhaps none captured the imagination quite like the performance of veteran goalkeeper Vozinha.

clusters.headline: Somalia: OIC Condemns Opening of Somaliland Mission in Jerusalem, Reaffirms Support for Somalia
clusters.summary: [Shabelle] Jeddah -- The Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) on Tuesday strongly condemned the opening of what it described as a "Somaliland embassy" in occupied Jerusalem, calling the move illegal and a clear violation of international law and the United Nations Charter.

clusters.headline: Nigeria: Exclusive - How General Rabe Abubakar's Body Was Recovered After Death in Captivity
clusters.summary: [Premium Times] A security source contradicts the initial account of how General Rabe Abubakar's body was recovered after he died in captivity

clusters.headline: California's Gavin Newsom alleges justice department is investigating his wife and ex-staff
clusters.summary: A source familiar with the investigations says they had been ongoing for "roughly a year".

clusters.headline: 'It was either killed or be killed' - ongoing nightmares of an ex-child soldier in Somalia
clusters.summary: Yusuf Ali, now 34, struggles with his memories living in Mogadishu surrounded by dark reminders of his past.
